variants: Emiel Baert, a gifted scholar in comparative literature, has made a significant impact in his field, which was acknowledged through the prestigious Lichen Bell Medal. His intellectual growth can be directly attributed to his mentor and doctoral advisor, Hajnalka Otvos, who provided guidance throughout his studies.
